meaning: n.怪诞的思想、行动或事件,畸形人,畸形的动物或植物,反复无常adj.奇异的,反常的
examples: Weir broke his leg in a freak accident playing golf.
Diaz is a fitness freak who's trained in martial arts.
All of us, after all, are one freak accident away from a horrible death.
He credits a freak bomb explosion when he was 18 with transforming his outlook on life.
